description: When it comes to our customer satisfaction we only work with top brands and top manufacturers that can deliver to satisfy our high standards of quality and protection. All our products, including our Ladies Trainer Sock, are tested long enough until they meet our rigorous requirements. Why you should order this product now? Because you care about your feet and your health. These Premium quality trainer socks are made for comfort and will keep you protected all day. Quality Premier trainer socks made from 52% Cotton, 46% Polyester, 2% Elastane finest yarns. Super fit and durable. 5 Pair Pack, smooth soft Unique designs and feel so good to wear. Walking, working or standing up, if you want to feel fresh, this product is for you too. Great features: 5 Pair Pack UK 4-7 Size 52% Cotton, 46% Polyester, 2% Elastane Lightweight but strong and durable Machine washable Multi designs to choose from Order now and take care of your feet Benefit from this great offer, only at SOCKSMAD LTD!
